directives.title: Build Neon DB contact export script
directives.task: Create tools/contact-verifier/export_contacts_from_db.py — a Python script that connects to Neon PostgreSQL via DATABASE_URL env var and exports all contacts to contacts.csv. CSV columns: first_name, last_name, full_name, company, company_domain, title, priority, category, rfq_status, email. The script must be syntactically valid Python and include a --dry-run flag that prints row count without writing. Also create tools/contact-verifier/EXPORT_README.md explaining how to run it.
directives.context: DATABASE_URL is set in .env. Table is likely named contacts or wave9_contacts. Priority mapping: Baker Hughes contacts = ACTIVE_RFQ, Tier 1 suppliers = TIER1, others = NORMAL. The script does not need to actually run during build — just be correct Python that will work when DATABASE_URL is available.

directives.title: Generate RFQ drafts for 6 remaining W251 priority contacts
directives.task: Create tools/rfq-generator/generate_rfqs.py and run it to produce 6 RFQ draft files in tools/rfq-generator/drafts/. One file per contact: rfq_tod_carpenter_donaldson.txt, rfq_bob_yeager_emerson.txt, rfq_rod_christie_bakerhughes.txt, rfq_michael_wynblatt_donaldson.txt, rfq_harrison_amerex.txt, rfq_neil_ashford_turbotect.txt. Each RFQ: professional C-suite email, under 300 words, references W251B8 power island Santa Teresa NM Project Jupiter, requests budgetary pricing for the relevant BOP category.
directives.context: Baker Hughes Simonelli RFQ already drafted ($340K Vibration Monitoring). Contacts: Tod Carpenter (Donaldson CEO, Inlet Air Filtering $480K), Bob Yeager (Emerson President Power, Fuel Gas $374K), Rod Christie (Baker Hughes EVP Turbomachinery), Michael Wynblatt (Donaldson CTO), Harrison K (Amerex VP, Fire Fighting $229K), Neil Ashford (Turbotect, Compressor Washing $132K). TWP is program manager. Sign as Greg Buchanan, CEO Trans World Power.

directives.title: Build pricing verification status tracker
directives.task: Create tools/pricing-discovery/track_verification_status.py and run it to produce two output files: tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/verification_status_report.md and tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/pricing_dashboard.txt. The report shows all 19 BOP categories with ESTIMATED vs VERIFIED status, total $ at risk, and RFQ send priority ranked by $ impact. The dashboard is a one-page executive summary. Read from tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/pricing_updated.csv for input data.
directives.context: All 19 categories currently COMPONENT_BUILDUPS confidence. Total BOP mid $9.274M. Trillium AVOID on PIPING_VALVES. Baker Hughes VIB_MON will upgrade when response received. 8 STRATEGIC tier categories above $500K.

directives.title: Generate W251 program intelligence master report
directives.task: Create tools/reports/w251_program_status.md — a comprehensive boardroom-ready executive brief. Sections: (1) Program Overview, (2) BOP Cost Model — all 19 categories with pricing, (3) Supplier Network — 73 suppliers, tier distribution, (4) Contact Pipeline — 231 contacts, RFQ readiness, (5) Active RFQs — Baker Hughes + 6 remaining targets with $ values, (6) Risk Register — Trillium AVOID, pricing unverified, contact gap, (7) Recommended 30-Day Action Plan. Use actual data from pricing_updated.csv and contacts_sample.csv.
directives.context: Project Jupiter. 50MW W251B8. Oracle/OpenAI campus Santa Teresa NM. TWP program manager. EthosEnergy GT supplier. Total BOP $9.274M. 1 RFQ drafted (Baker Hughes $340K). 6 more to send. CFO/CPO level document.
